meaning: n.福音,<俗>信仰,真理,<圣经·新约>福音书
examples: He wouldn't say this if it weren't the gospel truth.
So far, at least, Packard has been able to convert them to his gospel of self-reliance and penny-pinching.
Her music earned her four Dove Awards from the Gospel Music Association and two Grammy nominations.
Both bankers and policymakers took it as gospel that innovation is a good thing.
